title: Israeli strikes kill 14, wound 37 in southern Lebanon
snippet: IDF strikes killed 14, wounded 37 in southern Lebanon. Dead include 2 women and 2 children. Strikes targeted Hezbollah fighters, rocket launchers, weapons depot. Retaliatory wave after Fooks killing. 7 towns given evacuation orders.
tag_reason: New: Deadliest single day of strikes since ceasefire began — 14 killed, 37 wounded
